description: Template for meta posts about the blog itself, behind-the-scenes, Lemmy

data.label: Style
data.name: Comic Ink + Self-Referential
data.description: Heavy ink illustration. Bold black outlines, high contrast chiaroscuro with deep blacks and stark highlights. Cel-shaded shadows, graphic shapes. Muted palette with subtle digital glow accents. Hand-drawn comic book aesthetic with meta/surreal energy. Influenced by Dave McKean and Moebius. Mixed media texture acceptable. NOT photorealistic. Edge-to-edge composition.

data.label: Prop
data.description: Vintage microphone, stylized with digital energy, floating text fragments
